'''âk-p-k''' ('''kakapak''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:whatsapp|whatsapp]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-p-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:whatsapp|whatsapp]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âk-p-k
|-
! Lemma
| kakapak
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thikapak|thikapak]] || [[word:jikapak|jikapak]] || [[word:shikapak|shikapak]] || [[word:kikapak|kikapak]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthukapak|thuthukapak]] || [[word:jujukapak|jujukapak]] || [[word:shushukapak|shushukapak]] || [[word:kukukapak|kukukapak]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thukapak|thukapak]] || [[word:jukapak|jukapak]] || [[word:shukapak|shukapak]] || [[word:kukapak|kukapak]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thukapak|thukapak]] || [[word:jukapak|jukapak]] || [[word:shukapak|shukapak]] || [[word:kukapak|kukapak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thekapak|thekapak]] || [[word:jekapak|jekapak]] || [[word:shekapak|shekapak]] || [[word:kekapak|kekapak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothokapak|thothokapak]] || [[word:jojokapak|jojokapak]] || [[word:shoshokapak|shoshokapak]] || [[word:kokokapak|kokokapak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thokapak|thokapak]] || [[word:jokapak|jokapak]] || [[word:shokapak|shokapak]] || [[word:kokapak|kokapak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thokapak|thokapak]] || [[word:jokapak|jokapak]] || [[word:shokapak|shokapak]] || [[word:kokapak|kokapak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠkapak|thĂŠkapak]] || [[word:jĂŠkapak|jĂŠkapak]] || [[word:shĂŠkapak|shĂŠkapak]] || [[word:kĂŠkapak|kĂŠkapak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathakapak|thathakapak]] || [[word:jajakapak|jajakapak]] || [[word:shashakapak|shashakapak]] || [[word:kakakapak|kakakapak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thakapak|thakapak]] || [[word:jakapak|jakapak]] || [[word:shakapak|shakapak]] || [[word:kakapak|kakapak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thakapak|thakapak]] || [[word:jakapak|jakapak]] || [[word:shakapak|shakapak]] || [[word:kakapak|kakapak]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shakapak|shakapak]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshakapak|goshakapak]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishakapak|gokishakapak]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shakapaknĂŒ|shakapaknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshakapaknknĂŒ|goshakapaknknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishakapaknĂŒ|gokishakapaknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shakapakshĂ«|shakapakshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshakapaknkshĂ«|goshakapaknkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishakapakshĂ«|gokishakapakshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakapakro|shakapakro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakapaknkro|goshakapaknkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakapakro|gokishakapakro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shakapakmu|shakapakmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakapaknkmu|goshakapaknkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakapakmu|gokishakapakmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shakapaksher|shakapaksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshakapaknksher|goshakapaknksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishakapaksher|gokishakapaksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shakapakng|shakapakng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshakapaknkng|goshakapaknkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishakapakng|gokishakapakng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shakapakya|shakapakya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshakapaknkya|goshakapaknkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishakapakya|gokishakapakya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shakapakyam|shakapakyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshakapaknkyam|goshakapaknkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishakapakyam|gokishakapakyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakapaknĂŒshĂ«|shakapaknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakapaknknĂŒshĂ«|goshakapaknknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakapaknĂŒshĂ«|gokishakapaknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakapaknĂŒro|shakapaknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakapaknknĂŒro|goshakapaknknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakapaknĂŒro|gokishakapaknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakapaknĂŒmu|shakapaknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakapaknknĂŒmu|goshakapaknknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakapaknĂŒmu|gokishakapaknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakapakshĂ«nĂŒ|shakapakshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakapaknkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshakapaknkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakapakshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishakapakshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakapakshĂ«ro|shakapakshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakapaknkshĂ«ro|goshakapaknkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakapakshĂ«ro|gokishakapakshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakapakshĂ«mu|shakapakshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakapaknkshĂ«mu|goshakapaknkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakapakshĂ«mu|gokishakapakshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakapakronĂŒ|shakapakronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakapaknkronĂŒ|goshakapaknkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakapakronĂŒ|gokishakapakronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakapakroshĂ«|shakapakroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakapaknkroshĂ«|goshakapaknkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakapakroshĂ«|gokishakapakroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakapakromu|shakapakromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakapaknkromu|goshakapaknkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakapakromu|gokishakapakromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakapakmunĂŒ|shakapakmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakapaknkmunĂŒ|goshakapaknkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakapakmunĂŒ|gokishakapakmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakapakmushĂ«|shakapakmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakapaknkmushĂ«|goshakapaknkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakapakmushĂ«|gokishakapakmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakapakmuro|shakapakmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakapaknkmuro|goshakapaknkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakapakmuro|gokishakapakmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d03cc2d}}
